```py
startupProbe:
  httpGet:
    path: /health
    port: 80
  failureThreshold: 30
  periodSeconds: 10
```

```py
livenessProbe:
  httpGet:
    path: /health
    port: 80
  periodSeconds: 10
  failureThreshold: 3
```

```py
readinessProbe:
  httpGet:
    path: /health
    port: 80
  periodSeconds: 3
  failureThreshold: 1
  timeoutSeconds: 1
```
